name: vis-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for IEEE VIS (the IEEE Visualization Conference) full papers, published journal-integrated as a special issue of IEEE TVCG: routing among the six unified VIS areas, the two-phase review with its conditional-accept second round, author-optional double-blind submission through PCS under the VGTC society, the IEEE VGTC/TVCG 9+2 template, perceptual and design-study evaluation, the Graphics Replicability Stamp and Open Practices culture, supplemental video, and the TVCG camera-ready. Grounded in the IEEE VIS 2026 call, ieeevis.org, IEEE Xplore/TVCG, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
